sql:
WITH purchases AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        ARRAY(SELECT value FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => customDimensions) AS fWHERE index = 4 AND value = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley') AS purchase_product
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707*
    WHERE
        ARRAY_LENGTH(purchase_product) > 0
),
other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        ARRAY(SELECT value FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => customDimensions) AS fWHERE index = 4) AS other_products
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707*
    WHERE
        fullVisitorId IN (SELECT fullVisitorId FROM purchases)
        AND ARRAY_LENGTH(other_products) > 0
),
flattened_other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        value AS product
    FROM
        other_purchases,
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => other_products)
)
SELECT
    product,
    COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
FROM
    flattened_other_purchases
WHERE
    product != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
GROUP BY
    product
ORDER BY
    purchase_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
WITH purchases AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        ARRAY(SELECT value FROM UNNEST(customDimensions) WHERE index = 4 AND value = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley') AS purchase_product
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707*
    WHERE
        ARRAY_LENGTH(purchase_product) > 0
),
other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        ARRAY(SELECT value FROM UNNEST(customDimensions) WHERE index = 4) AS other_products
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707*
    WHERE
        fullVisitorId IN (SELECT fullVisitorId FROM purchases)
        AND ARRAY_LENGTH(other_products) > 0
),
flattened_other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        value AS product
    FROM
        other_purchases,
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => other_products)
)
SELECT
    product,
    COUNT(*) AS purchase_count
FROM
    flattened_other_purchases
WHERE
    product != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
GROUP BY
    product
ORDER BY
    purchase_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenues AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals:totalTransactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenue
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801
    GROUP BY
        trafficSource,
        month
),
MaxMinRevenues AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource,
        MAX(total_revenue) AS max_revenue,
        MIN(total_revenue) AS min_revenue
    FROM
        MonthlyRevenues
    GROUP BY
        trafficSource
)
SELECT
    trafficSource,
    ROUND(max_revenue - min_revenue, 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM
    MaxMinRevenues
ORDER BY
    max_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM

ORDER BY
    max_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
SELECT 
    v.fullVisitorId,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(v.date), MIN(t.transactionDate)) AS days_elapsed,
    t.deviceType
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801 v
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => v.customDimensions) cd ON true
LEFT JOIN 
    (SELECT 
         fullVisitorId, 
         MIN(date) AS transactionDate, 
         device.deviceCategory AS deviceType
     FROM 
         GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_2016080*
     WHERE 
         date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
         AND totals.transactions > 0
     GROUP BY 
         fullVisitorId, device.deviceCategory) t ON v.fullVisitorId = t.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
    v.date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
GROUP BY 
    v.fullVisitorId, t.deviceType;

        trafficSource,
        SUM(TRY_TO_NUMBER(totals::VARIANT->>'totalTransactionRevenue')) / 1000000 AS total_revenue_millions,

        DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week,

        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160801

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 AND totals.totalTransactionRevenue IS NOT NULL THEN 'Purchase'
        ELSE 'Non-Purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170401
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170402
    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170412
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM

  product_name: TEXT
  quantity: NUMBER

sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS nextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS maxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201701 AS s
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h
WHERE 
    s.date LIKE '201701%'
    AND s.customDimensions[0].value = 'Data Share'
    AND h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS nextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS maxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201701 AS s
LATERAL JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h
WHERE 
    s.date LIKE '201701%'
    AND s.customDimensions[0].value = 'Data Share'
    AND h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH filtered_sessions AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE WHEN MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS purchase_status
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170630'
        AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE WHEN MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS purchase_status
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731'
        AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT
        month,
        purchase_status,
        COUNT(fullVisitorId) AS visitor_count,
        SUM(total_pageviews) AS total_pageviews
    FROM
        filtered_sessions
    GROUP BY
        month,
        purchase_status
)
SELECT
    month,
    purchase_status,
    AVG(total_pageviews / visitor_count) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
    grouped_data
GROUP BY
    month,
    purchase_status;
original_sql:
WITH filtered_sessions AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE WHEN MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS purchase_status
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170630'
        AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE WHEN MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS purchase_status
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731'
        AND totals.pageviews IS NOT NULL
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT
        month,
        purchase_status,
        COUNT(fullVisitorId) AS visitor_count,
        SUM(total_pageviews) AS total_pageviews
    FROM
        filtered_sessions
    GROUP BY
        month,
        purchase_status
)
SELECT
    month,
    purchase_status,
    AVG(total_pageviews / visitor_count) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
    grouped_data
GROUP BY
    month,
    purchase_status;
